048ffa17.code:
def descriptor(rA, rB, rX, nA, nB, nX):
    import math
    # Calculate the geometric mean of ionic radii ratios
    radius_ratio_mean = math.sqrt((rA / rX) * (rB / rX))
    # Calculate the charge imbalance factor
    charge_imbalance = abs(nA / rA - nB / rB)
    # Combine geometric mean and charge imbalance using a hyperbolic tangent for smoothness
    value = math.tanh(radius_ratio_mean - charge_imbalance / 10)
    return value
048ffa17.description: This descriptor captures the combined effect of ionic size ratios and charge imbalance, which are critical for perovskite stability. The geometric mean of the radii ratios reflects the overall size compatibility of the ions, while the charge imbalance term accounts for electrostatic effects that influence structural stability. Using a hyperbolic tangent ensures the descriptor is bounded and smoothly varies, helping to reduce overlap between stable and unstable compounds, especially across different anion types.
